Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 103 

HOSP_AT_HOME_THRU_DT 

LABEL: Hospital at Home Care Through Date 

DESCRIPTION: This variable represents the ending date of the beneficiary’s acute hospital at home care stay. 

SHORT NAME: HOSP_AT_HOME_THRU_DT 

LONG NAME: HOSP_AT_HOME_THRU_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2021. 

This field is derived when the occurrence span
